title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg (The Criterion Collection) [Blu-ray]

variation_files.prompt: A close-up, intimate scene featuring two people in a dimly lit, atmospheric setting. The lighting is soft and warm, focused on their faces, with a shallow depth of field that blurs the background into indistinct shapes and glowing bokeh lights. One person, seen from the side, leans in to kiss the cheek of the other, who has their eyes closed and a gentle, serene smile. The person being kissed has light-colored hair styled with a small decorative accessory, and wears a soft, textured garment in a warm tone. The other person wears a light-colored jacket over a collared shirt with a patterned tie. The overall mood is romantic and tender, with a cinematic quality emphasized by the low-key lighting and selective focus.

A close-up shot of two women in a tense, fearful moment, set in a natural outdoor environment with dry earth and sparse trees in the background. The woman on the left has her hand over her mouth, eyes wide with shock, and wears a dark headband with a bow. The woman on the right, with shoulder-length dark hair, clutches her from behind, her face contorted in alarm, teeth bared slightly, and eyes darting sideways. Both appear dirty and distressed, suggesting they are in danger or hiding. The lighting is natural and muted, casting soft shadows, enhancing the sense of urgency and dread. The overall composition focuses tightly on their expressions and physical interaction, with a shallow depth of field blurring the background slightly.

title: Eyes Without a Face (The Criterion Collection) [Blu-ray]

variation_files.prompt:
A black-and-white still photograph of a person standing in a dimly lit, vintage-style interior room. The person is positioned slightly to the left of center, wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved robe with a high collar and tied cuffs, and has short, wavy dark hair. Their face is pale and expressionless, with dark, wide eyes, giving a doll-like or mannequin appearance. They are looking off to the right side of the frame.

A black-and-white surgical scene featuring two medical professionals in full scrubs, masks, and gloves, performing a procedure on a patient lying on an operating table. The patient's face is partially covered with a dark, textured material, and metal wires or clips are attached to the facial area, suggesting a reconstructive or experimental surgery. A large, dome-shaped surgical light hangs above, casting focused illumination on the patient’s head. The background is a dimly lit operating room with tiled walls and medical equipment faintly visible. The overall lighting is high-contrast, with strong highlights and deep shadows, emphasizing the clinical and intense atmosphere of the scene.

A split-screen layout featuring two distinct horizontal panels. The top panel shows a close-up of two people lying together on a bed, viewed from above, with one person resting their head on the other’s chest; the background is a solid light blue, and the scene is framed by a thick, bright pink border at the bottom. The bottom panel is a solid black background with a thick, bright pink border at the top, creating a strong visual separation from the top panel. The overall composition is centered and balanced, with the central image of the two people occupying the upper portion, and the lower black panel left empty and unmarked. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the figures in the upper panel with gentle shadows. The scene conveys intimacy

The bottom black panel is also bordered by a thin, jagged pink line above it and a bright blue border at the very bottom. variation_files.prompt: A group of women in a dance fitness studio, captured mid-movement with arms raised and bodies in dynamic poses. Behind her, other women in colorful workout attire are engaged in synchronized dance movements. The setting includes a wooden floor, a gray wall with colorful panels in the background, and soft purple and blue ambient lighting from decorative lights above. The overall atmosphere is energetic and lively, with a shallow depth of field that keeps the foreground subject in sharp focus while softly blurring the background dancers.

A medium shot of two people sitting on a white sofa in a modern living room, engaged in a conversation. variation_files.prompt: A low-angle shot of a person’s lower legs and feet wearing the sneaker, standing on a smooth, gray concrete floor against a plain white wall. The person is wearing cuffed blue jeans with frayed hems, and a decorative silver anklet is visible on the left ankle. The sneaker is shown from a front-three-quarter perspective, with the left foot slightly forward and the right foot angled back, emphasizing the side profile and sole. The lighting is bright and even, creating soft shadows beneath the feet. The composition focuses tightly on the footwear and lower legs, with no additional objects or text in the frame.

A split-screen, full-length product shot showing a person’s lower legs and feet wearing the sneaker, with the left foot angled slightly outward and the right foot facing forward. The person is wearing cuffed blue denim jeans with frayed hems, and a decorative silver ankle chain is visible on the left ankle. The sneaker is shown from two perspectives: a side profile on the left and a front-facing view on the right. The background is plain white, with even, bright studio lighting that highlights the texture of the jeans and the sneaker’s knit upper. The composition focuses on the footwear and its casual, stylish integration with everyday attire.

A low-angle, close-up shot of a person's feet wearing the sneaker, standing on a smooth, gray tiled floor. The person is wearing cuffed blue denim jeans with frayed hems, and a delicate silver anklet is visible on the left ankle. The background is a plain, light gray wall with soft, even lighting that highlights the texture of the jeans and the sneaker's knit upper. The composition focuses on the lower legs and feet, emphasizing the casual, stylish fit of the sneaker in a relaxed, everyday setting.

The lighting is warm and soft, casting subtle shadows on the man’s face and neck, enhancing the contemplative and introspective mood of the scene.
